# 🎯 Task 04.1: Schema.org Parser

## 📅 Sprint Info  
- **Duration:** 4 days | **M2** | **P1** | **Depends:** 03.5 ✅ | **Blocks:** 04.2

## 🎬 Build
Parse JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa from any language web pages. Extract @type and key fields.

## 📋 Days
**D1-2:** JSON-LD/Microdata/RDFa parsers  
**D3:** Universal @type extraction, field mapping  
**D4:** Test 1000+ pages, validation

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Parses JSON-LD, Microdata, and RDFa.
- [ ] `@type` detection reaches ≥90% accuracy on a versioned test corpus.
- [ ] Parser preserves Unicode text and works across the M1.5 language/script buckets.
- [ ] Throughput reaches 10K+ pages/sec on benchmark input.

## 📊 Quality Evidence
- [ ] Attach extraction precision/recall report by schema format.
- [ ] Include Persian/Iran commerce pages in the structured-data test set.
- [ ] Report malformed markup, duplicate schema blocks, and missing-field failure examples.
- [ ] Link to the latest M1.5 evaluation report if parsed fields affect ranking.

## 🎉 Celebrate: Show structured data extraction!
## 📦 Delivers: `schema_parser.py`
## 🚀 Next: 04.2 (ISBN/Price)
